creator: gibbs@plutotech.com
text:
There is a known firmware problem with the Quantum Atlas drive that is
tickled by the, now much faster, aic7xxx driver.  You should be running
L915 firmware on sd2.  You may also be able to update your sd0 drive
to L915, but since the firmware is so different on that drive, I'm not
sure.  You can pick up the latest firmware from:

ftp://ftp.quantum.com/Firmware/Atlas I/

--
Justin T. Gibbs
===========================================
  FreeBSD: Turning PCs into workstations
===========================================
